$comment: SOC 2 provisioning manifest for a simple-soc2 install (scripts/provision-target-repo.ts). This is the PROFILE-DERIVED branch-protection control (design-doc gap G1): branch protection, required checks, and repo security settings ship as a committed, change-managed file — not an out-of-band console click. enforce_admins:true and required_reviews:1 are the SOC 2 hardening over simple-gh-sdlc's permissive defaults. NOTE required_checks lists ONLY the checks that reliably post on BOT-authored PRs (ci=adopter product CI, agent-review=reviewer, human-approval=gate, all dispatched by the proposer effect). codeql + supply-chain (security.yml) SHIP and run on every push/PR/weekly, but are NOT in required_checks yet: making them blocking on bot PRs needs proposer-effect dispatch wiring in the shared runtime (flagged follow-on in README C8) — putting them here today would WEDGE every agent PR (GITHUB_TOKEN anti-recursion). required_signatures is OFF in v1 (DCO compensating control; keyless commit signing is the follow-on — README C6).
